subLocations.name: Lake Macalania
subLocations.prose: The Travel Agency is your last save point and shop before two back-to-back boss fights — stock up. Clasko is outside and gives a useful hint about chocobo breeding; suggest he try it and he'll reward you later with a Friend Sphere. Primer XVI is on the ground near him. Save before heading into the temple — you won't be able to come back.

subLocations.name: Macalania Temple
subLocations.prose: Inside, Tromell gives a Shell Targe and Shelinda is here — collect both X-Potions and the 5,000 gil from the main hall before entering the Cloister. After the Seymour fight you're immediately on the run through the ice tunnel — Guado Guardians chase you out, and if one catches you it triggers a battle. You won't return to Macalania Temple.

bosses.strategy: Destroy the Negator first (1,000 HP) — it nullifies all magic. Once it's down, Haste your party and cast Blizzard/Ice on Crawler. Power Break reduces its physical damage. When it charges the cannon, hit it to interrupt. HP: 16,000 + Negator 1,000.

Two phases. Phase 1: Kill the Guado Guardians first — they cast NulAll on Seymour, blocking magic. Seymour uses NulBlaze + NulFrost; wait them out or use Dispel. Phase 2: Anima appears (18,000 HP) — use your own Aeons or Thunder. Seymour's HP: 6,000 + 6,000. Have Yuna ready to heal throughout.
